headline: 1 Healthcare Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: Healthcare companies are pushing the status quo by innovating in areas like drug development and digital health. Players catalyzing medical advancements have benefited from elevated demand, and their momentum is only rising as the industry has posted a 1.1% gain over the past six months while the S&P 500 was flat.
